assertions.title: Single-video intake classifies the link and routes directly to preparation

steps.action: Navigate to / and inspect the intake form
steps.expected: Single input intake form is available
steps.observed: The page showed a Douyin Link textbox and Continue button

steps.action: Submit a supported Douyin single-video URL
steps.expected: App classifies the link as a single video and routes directly to preparation
steps.observed: POST /api/intake completed and the app navigated directly to /sessions/session_e0169aa6fe9527cb9724c0e6 without showing candidate review

steps.expected: Preparation page identifies the session as single video
steps.observed: The page displayed 'Input Type: single video' and 'Phase: preparation'

assertions.title: Single-video preparation starts with exactly one item

steps.action: Observe the first page after single-video intake
steps.expected: Preparation page is shown with one preparation item and no candidate-review detour
steps.observed: The first page after intake was the preparation page and no candidate-review UI appeared

steps.expected: Exactly one preparation item for the selected video is rendered
steps.observed: The page showed a 'Preparation Status (Coming Soon)' placeholder instead of a preparation item row

steps.action: Inspect session payload for preparation items
steps.expected: Session payload includes exactly one item
steps.observed: GET /api/sessions/session_e0169aa6fe9527cb9724c0e6 returned itemCount 0 and an empty items array

assertions.issues: Single-video intake reaches preparation, but the preparation session contains zero items and the UI only shows a coming-soon placeholder instead of one preparation item.

frictions.description: The shared user-testing guidance file /Users/wendy/.factory/library/user-testing.md was missing, so only mission-local guidance and the validation contract were available.
frictions.resolution: Proceeded using AGENTS.md and validation-contract.md only.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 1 passed, 1 failed (VAL-PREP-002: preparation page showed zero items instead of exactly one).
